title: Warcraft III: Reign of Chaos
edition_pinned: Genre evidence from archived eBay product page for WarCraft III: Reign of Chaos (Windows/Mac, 2002), ePID 9217, captured 2025-12-21 and observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 2002 base-game design and excludes the 2003 The Frozen Throne expansion.
moat: Persistent heroes and upkeep thresholds force army composition to trade expansion against concentrated power.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Four factions reuse economy and combat rules while heroes and items create match-specific build paths.
exemplar_rationale: Shows how hero progression can sit inside resettable real-time strategy without replacing economy play.

evidence.claim: Archived eBay Product Key Features listed Genre: Strategy for WarCraft III: Reign of Chaos (Windows/Mac, 2002).
